with grief and with praise
to feed it
the annual return to the threshold
where the community reconstitutes itself

for was the continuation of that life

that holds the field open
the institutional form of love

The herd of centaurs — each one

feeding the flowering that is the point

You wonderful weird birds.

reading what is in front of you
